description: FGAP-042: extend the whole-draft prose scanner (check_draft._iter_prose_fields) to walk domain_alignment -- the targeted-row rationale AND the deferred-gap reason -- so domain_alignment prose enters the whole-draft language-WARN scan, completing the scanner's stated 'every prose string in the draft' contract. Workshop-only (check_draft.py).
acceptance_criteria: The whole-draft prose scanner yields domain_alignment prose -- both the targeted-row rationale and the deferred-gap reason -- so they enter the whole-draft language-WARN scan; demonstrated.
A banned process-method term or scaffolding label placed in a domain_alignment rationale or reason is surfaced by the whole-draft scan; demonstrated.
No previously-passing check moves from passing to failing: the parity gate passes 14/14, the project gate is green, and the existing whole-draft checks stay passing.
